executives.name: Andrea Jung
executives.background: Ms. Jung has served as the President and CEO of Grameen America, a non-profit microfinance organization, since 2014. She previously served as Chairman and CEO of Avon Products, Inc.

executives.name: Ann Fudge
executives.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Young & Rubicam Brands.

executives.name: Marc Engel
executives.background: Marc Engel was previously the Chief Supply Chain Officer at Unilever. He has extensive experience in global supply chain management and sustainability.

board_of_directors.name: Andrea Jung
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Jung has served as the President and CEO of Grameen America, a non-profit microfinance organization, since 2014. She previously served as Chairman and CEO of Avon Products, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Ann Fudge
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Young & Rubicam Brands.

board_of_directors.name: Nils Andersen
board_of_directors.background: Nils Andersen was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2023 and became Chairman in 2024. He is the former CEO of A.P. Moller-Maersk and Carlsberg.
